option.name: fileSummaryMaps
option.value: {"D:/Projects/Java/WorldChatter":"{\"/src/main/java/me/omaromar93/worldchatter/utils/Others/ThreadsSystem.java\":\"\",\"/src/main/java/me/omaromar93/worldchatter/utils/Others/UpdaterSystem.java\":\"\\npublic class UpdaterSystem {\\r\",\"/src/main/java/me/omaromar93/worldchatter/Main.java\":\"\\npublic final class Main extends JavaPlugin {\",\"/src/main/java/me/omaromar93/worldchatter/utils/methods/AntiSwear.java\":\"\\npublic class AntiSwear {\\r\",\"/src/main/java/me/omaromar93/worldchatter/utils/Others/PAPIDependSystem.java\":\"\\npublic class PAPIDependSystem {\\r\",\"/src/main/java/me/omaromar93/worldchatter/utils/methods/AntiADs.java\":\"\\npublic class AntiADs {\\r\",\"/src/main/java/me/omaromar93/worldchatter/utils/chatting/ChatEventHandler.java\":\"\\npublic class ChatEventHandler implements Listener {\\r\",\"/src/main/java/me/omaromar93/worldchatter/utils/chatting/CommandSystem.java\":\"\\npublic class CommandSystem implements CommandExecutor {\\r\",\"/src/main/java/me/omaromar93/worldchatter/utils/methods/MethodHandler.java\":\"\\npublic class MethodHandler {\\r\",\"/src/main/java/me/omaromar93/worldchatter/utils/methods/Expression.java\":\"\\npublic class Expression {\\r\",\"/src/main/java/me/omaromar93/worldchatter/utils/chatting/ChattingSystem.java\":\"\\npublic class ChattingSystem {\\r\",\"/src/main/java/me/omaromar93/worldchatter/utils/Others/CacheSystem.java\":\"\\npublic class CacheSystem {\\r\",\"/src/main/java/me/omaromar93/worldchatter/utils/Others/ConfigSystem.java\":\"\\npublic class ConfigSystem {\\r\"}"}
